title: Ethereum Foundation Discloses Validator Crash Bug Found With AI Help
dek: The Ethereum Foundation disclosed a bug in validator client software that could take validators offline. The flaw was found with AI assistance but required humans to prove it was exploitable. Reporting describes it as a remotely triggerable crash.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: A remotely triggerable crash bug in validator client software was found with AI help and confirmed by humans, disclosed by the Ethereum Foundation.
body: The Ethereum Foundation has disclosed a bug in validator client software that could take validators offline, according to reporting. The flaw is described as a remotely triggerable crash.
The bug was found with the assistance of AI, but humans were required to prove it was exploitable.
